title: sutera cuneata
intro: Sutera cuneata, also known as the cut-leaved or cuneate Sutera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sutera cuneata include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce inflammation, and combat infection. Sutera cuneata can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
